com.pax.poslink

Class POSLinkAndroid

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.POSLinkAndroid

  • public class POSLinkAndroid
extends java.lang.Object
    This is for the POSLink Lib initialization. Please use it when your application start.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      POSLinkAndroid() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void init(Context context)
      Default initial method with default comm setting for POSListenerLauncher.
      static void init(Context context, CommSetting commSetting)
      This is the initialization function for the whole lib.

      This is the initialization function for the whole lib.

    • Constructor Detail

      • POSLinkAndroid

        public POSLinkAndroid()

    • Method Detail

      • init

        public static void init(Context context)
        Default initial method with default comm setting for POSListenerLauncher. The default communication setting varies from different machine you used.
        Parameters:
        context - application context

      • init

        public static void init(Context context,
                        CommSetting commSetting)
        This is the initialization function for the whole lib. Please call it when your application start.
        Parameters:
        context - application context
        commSetting - The communication setting for POSListenerLauncher

      • init

        public static void init(Context context,
                        CommSetting commSetting,
                        SubLogSetting subLogSetting)
        This is the initialization function for the whole lib. Please call it when your application start.
        Parameters:
        context - application context
        commSetting - The communication setting for POSListenerLauncher
        subLogSetting - If the SubLogSetting is set in the current POSLink instance, then the Log recorded during the execution of the POSLink will adopt the configuration of SubLogSetting.

      • initPOSListener

        public static void initPOSListener(Context context,
                                   CommSetting setting)
        Init the listener for POS. For internal use. Most of the time you do not need to call this.
